overview: A functional medicine clinic specializing in the BIGGE (Brain-Immune-Gut-Genetics-Endocrine) approach to identify and address root causes of chronic health conditions. Dr. Serle provides personalized treatment plans for patients in Jacksonville and St. Augustine.
highlights: BIGGE-axis diagnostic approach targeting interconnected body systems
Professional-grade supplement dispensary with patient discounts
targetAudience: Patients with chronic conditions seeking root-cause functional medicine treatment rather than symptom management.
